title: Kvag Gthull
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:KvagGthull.jpg]] |name=Kvag Gthull |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]][[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]] {{C|[[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]}} |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Dark Empire]] **[[Dark Side Elite]] **[[Dark Side Squadron]][[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]] |masters=[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|''Gthull!'' Has the prisoner reveled the whereabouts of the ''Jedi children'' yet?"''
''"''Yes, Excellency!''|Palpatine arrives to oversee Ntthan's interrogation|}} '''Kvag Gthull''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] and a member of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Dark Side Elite]]. Chief interrogator at the Elite's stronghold, [[Bast Castle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]], he was responsible for [[Torture/Legends|gathering information]] from [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Ntthan]] after his capture in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], in order to learn the name of the planet where the [[Solo twins]] were being hidden. Following the will of his Emperor, he later participated in an [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|abduction attempt]] on that planet, named [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]]. Led by [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Xecr Nist]], the [[darksider]]s infiltrated the planet, and Gthull captured the children. However, the twins were saved by young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Rayf Ysanna]], while Gthull was killed by their mother, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|''Gthull! Alert the armored attack!'' Tell them to strike ''now!''"
"Armor's on its way, Nist! I got the ''Jedi brats''|Xecr Nist and Kvag Gthull|}} Kvag Gthull was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] serving the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], during his [[Transfer essence|rebirth]] in [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] bodies. When Palpatine created an elite corps of Dark Jedi, the [[Dark Side Elite]], Gthull was among the original seven [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who were inducted into that order.''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' The group, led by [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]], made [[Bast Castle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] their base of operations, and Gthull became chief interrogator there.{{CSWECite|I||Gthull, Kvag}} In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Palpatine was [[Battle of Pinnacle Base|killed]] yet again in battle with [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]],[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]] but he did return once more,[[Dark Empire II 1|''Dark Empire II'' 1]] and he sought to capture the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] children of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], Skywalker's sister, who were being hidden on a secret sanctuary world of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. When New Republic [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Ntthan]] was captured by the Empire in an uncharted region of space, he was brought to Bast Castle and delivered to Gthull, who was given the task of [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] out the information about Organa Solo's whereabouts from the man. [[File:DSEliteNewAlderaan.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Gthull reports to Nist on Sha and Mordi's failure.]] Gthull used [[Interrogation droid/Legends|interrogation droids]] on the man, who displayed remarkable resistance. Gthull had to spend twelve hours in interrogation sessions, but he was ultimately able to break Ntthan's defense, and the latter revealed the name of the planet, [[New Alderaan/Legends|New Alderaan]], as well as its coordinates, just as Palpatine arrived at Bast Castle to oversee the results of Gthull's handiwork. Palpatine also brought with him the new Executor, [[Xecr Nist]], a replacement for the [[Skirmish on Ossus|recently fallen]] Sedriss,[[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] to take command of the group. Gthull and the rest of the Dark Jedi were then ordered by Palpatine to go to New Alderaan on a covert mission to abduct Skywalker and the Solo twins, before launching an attack on the settlement using [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]]. Gthull piloted an [[I-7 Howlrunner]] as part of [[Dark Side Squadron]] on a journey to New Alderaan. Arriving on the planet undetected, Nist dispatched Elite members [[Tedryn-Sha]] and [[Krdys Mordi]] to deal with Skywalker. Gthull and three others went with Nist to kidnap the children. However, Gthull soon lost contact with Sha and Mordi and [[Force sense/Legends|felt]] their life energy vanishing from [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. He reported that to Nist, just as the darksiders arrived at the building where the children were being kept. Nist dispatched Gthull inside the building to grab the twins, while he and the other darksiders were confronted by Skywalker's Jedi recruits: [[Kam Solusar]], [[Rayf Ysanna]] and [[Empatojayos Brand]]. However, having lost one Dark Jedi and having been bested in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|combat]] by Solusar, Nist told Gthull to signal the AT-ATs to [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|attack]] at that moment. Emerging from the building while holding the twins, Gthull alerted the heavy armor. However, Rayf Ysanna used the Force to [[Telekinesis/Legends|levitate]] the twins from Gthull into the arms of [[Winter Celchu|Winter]], their caretaker. Running out from Skywalker's quarters, where she had just defeated Sha and Mordi, Organa Solo shot Gthull with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], killing the Dark Jedi. With Gthull dead, Nist and the two remaining darksiders retreated from New Alderaan under covering fire from the advancing AT-ATs. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|''Increase the amplitude!'' This Rebel will tell us the ''exact'' location of the base he's supplying.|Gthull, while interrogating Ntthan|}} [[File:Leia_kills_Gthull.jpg|thumb|150px|Gthull is shot by Leia Organa Solo.]] Kvag Gthull was a darksider loyal to Galactic Emperor Palpatine and was chosen to be the chief interrogator at Bast Castle. In that capacity, he subjected Major Ntthan to painful torture procedures to please his Master and discover the location of the Solo twins. Gthull considered Sha and Mordi fools for failing their mission on New Alderaan and was dismissive toward the Solo twins, calling them "Jedi brats." Gthull was a towering figure, who wore the traditional garb of the Dark Side Elite: black hooded [[Robe/Legends|robes]], [[gauntlet]]s and [[Boot/Legends|boots]]. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|''Executor Nist!'' I've lost contact with ''Sha'' and ''Mordi''—their life force has vanished. The fools have ''failed'' us.|Gthull|}} Kvag Gthull was a Dark Jedi, empowered with the dark side by Palpatine, his eyes glowing yellow as a result of that. He was able to sense the deaths of Sha and Mordi through the Force. He could pilot an I-7 Howlrunner. ==Behind the scenes== Kvag Gthull first appeared in the [[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] of the comic series, in which he was killed. In the [[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]], Gthull's role is almost completely filled by Xecr Nist. Nist serves as Ntthan's interrogator, using scarab droids filled with poison. After Gthull captures the Solo children on New Alderaan, Nist takes them from him and guards them, while the rest of the darksiders fight the Jedi. When all of the Dark Jedi have been slain, Nist tries to escape, but he is shot by Organa Solo. Author, [[Gary Gerani]], in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Collector]]'' article ''"[[ComicScan]]: Comics That Almost Were"'', surmised that Gthull was originally set to appear in Veitch's proposed short novel [[Lightsider (story)|''Lightsider'']] which would have taken place before ''Dark Empire II'' and would have introduced the Dark Side Elite. However, ''Lightsider'' was never published.{{CollectorCite|4|ComicScan|ComicScan: Comics That Almost Were}} ==Appearances== *[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]] *[[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CollectorCite|4|ComicScan|ComicScan: Comics That Almost Were}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Kvag Gthull}} {{Reflist}} ===Cut appearances=== *[[Lightsider (story)|''Lightsider'']] {{C|Unpublished}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Gthull, Kvag}} [[Category:Dark Side Elite]] [[Category:Dark Side Squadron members]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Torturers and interrogators]]
